messages.content: Reply with exactly the word blue.
Explain why the sky is blue in one sentence.

prompts.reference_output_text: The sky is blue because of Rayleigh scattering, where shorter blue wavelengths of sunlight are scattered more easily by the molecules in the atmosphere than longer red wavelengths.
prompts.llama_cpp_output_text: The sky is blue because of Rayleigh scattering, where shorter blue wavelengths of sunlight are scattered more widely by the gases and particles in the atmosphere than longer red wavelengths
